title: Bauble Mounts
description: A mod that allows you to “carry” your mounts always with you!
body:
### Bauble Mounts – Convenient Mount Management

This mod lets you store your mounts in special bauble items, which can be carried in a Curios slot. Once equipped, you can summon or recall your mount anytime with a simple keybind.

Even if your mount falls in battle, you can revive it directly from the bauble—no need to find a replacement.

#### Features:

*   Works with vanilla mounts (horses, pigs, camels) and any mobs using standard riding mechanics (startRiding/stopRiding).
*   Highly configurable to suit your playstyle.
*   **Compatibility**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
*   **Ice and Fire (via [Bauble Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/bauble-dragons))**
  
*   **Chococraft (via [Bauble Chocobo](https://modrinth.com/mod/bauble-chocobo)).**

*   **Mythic Mounts**

*   **Alex Mobs**

*   **Dragon Mounts: Legacy**

*   **and almost any other mods**

</details>

### Visual

**Mount Bauble** - item, which can be used to grab any **Mount**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1101642/description_df77063c-6b12-4c7e-a937-07befbeff15d.png)

**Vehicle Key** - item, which can be used to grab any **Vehicle**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1101642/description_8f9f68c9-2393-4d0a-9e9e-65440842d376.png)
